refined_label: General apparel & accessories — mixed gender footwear & casual wear
description: This neuron activates broadly across clothing, shoes, and jewelry categories with no single dominant subcategory. The items span men's and women's footwear (hiking boots, loafers, sneakers, sandals), casual clothing (t-shirts, jackets, sweaters), and accessories (wallets, jewelry), representing a general mixed-gender apparel pattern.
